name: Astral-Miraidon (Cyber Paradox)
description: A futuristic cyber-dragon entity from an advanced astral timeline. It hovers on high-frequency anti-gravity engines and controls cosmic plasma fields.
originLore: Transported from a future epoch where technology and cosmic light converged into sentient digital dragons.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Miraidon overcharges local energy grids with clean hadron plasma, enabling instant interstellar warp travel.

quantumResonators.name: Electro Drift (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Spins through the field on plasma rings, delivering a devastating electric strike.

quantumResonators.name: Hadron Overdrive
quantumResonators.description: Charges the electric terrain to boost Special Attack power for all active allies.
